name: beeper__search_chats
description: [Beeper (WhatsApp/GV/iMessage comms)] Search chats by title/network or participants using Beeper Desktop's renderer algorithm. Optional 'scope'.

accountIDs.description: Provide an array of account IDs to filter chats from specific messaging accounts only

items.description: Account ID this resource belongs to.

cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor; do not inspect. Use together with 'direction'.

direction.description: Pagination direction used with 'cursor': 'before' fetches older results, 'after' fetches newer results. Defaults to 'before' when only 'cursor' is provided.

inbox.description: Filter by inbox type: "primary" (non-archived, non-low-priority), "low-priority", or "archive". If not specified, shows all chats.

includeMuted.description: Include chats marked as Muted by the user, which are usually less important. Default: true. Set to false if the user wants a more refined search.

lastActivityAfter.description: Provide an ISO datetime string to only retrieve chats with last activity after this time

lastActivityBefore.description: Provide an ISO datetime string to only retrieve chats with last activity before this time

limit.description: Set the maximum number of chats to retrieve. Valid range: 1-200, default is 50

query.description: Literal token search (non-semantic). Use single words users type (e.g., "dinner"). When multiple words provided, ALL must match. Case-insensitive.

scope.description: Search scope: 'titles' matches title + network; 'participants' matches participant names.

type.description: Specify the type of chats to retrieve: use "single" for direct messages, "group" for group chats, or "any" to get all types

unreadOnly.description: Set to true to only retrieve chats that have unread messages
